children.heading: Review of Government activities; description of progress; assessment of impact of prog­ress; determinations regarding non-nuclear-weapon states; counterproductiveness of policies
children.label: a Review of Government activities; description of progress; assessment of impact of prog­ress; determinations regarding non-nuclear-weapon states; counterproductiveness of policies
A
children.text: negotiating the initiatives contemplated in sections 3223 and 3224 of this title;

children.label: B
children.text: negotiating the international arrangements or other mutual undertakings contemplated in ;section 2153b of title 42

children.label: C
children.text: encouraging non-nuclear-weapon states that are not party to the Treaty to adhere to the Treaty or, pending such adherence, to enter into comparable agreements with respect to safeguards and to foreswear the development of any nuclear explosive devices, and discouraging nuclear exports to non-nuclear-weapon states which have not taken such steps;

children.label: D
children.text: strengthening the safeguards of the IAEA as contemplated in ; andsection 3241 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: renegotiating agreements for cooperation as contemplated in ;section 2153c(a) of title 42

an assessment of the impact of the progress described in paragraph (1) on the non-proliferation policy of the United States; an explanation of the precise reasons why progress has not been made on any particular point and recommendations with respect to appropriate measures to encourage progress; and a statement of what legislative modifications, if any, are necessary in his judgment to achieve the non-proliferation policy of the United States;

children.label: A
children.text: detonated a nuclear device; or

children.label: B
children.text: refused to accept the safeguards of the IAEA on all of their peaceful nuclear activities; or

children.label: C
children.text: refused to give specific assurances that they will not manufacture or otherwise acquire any nuclear explosive device; or

children.label: D
children.text: engaged in activities involving source or special nuclear material and having direct significance for the manufacture or acquisition of nuclear explosive devices;
an assessment of whether any of the policies set forth in this chapter have, on balance, been counterproductive from the standpoint of preventing proliferation;

a description of the progress made toward establishing procedures to facilitate the timely processing of requests for subsequent arrangements and export licenses in order to enhance the reliability of the United States in meeting its commitments to supply nuclear reactors and fuel to nations which adhere to effective non-proliferation policies;1So in original. Probably should be “; and”.1

children.label: i
children.text: an export license was issued for any good controlled under ;section 2139a(c) of title 42

children.label: ii
children.text: an export license was issued under ;section 2139(b) of title 42

children.label: iii
children.text: approvals were issued under the Export Administration Act of 1979, or , for the retransfer of any item, technical data, component, or substance; orsection 2139(b)(3) of title 42

children.label: iv
children.text: authorizations were made as required by to engage, directly or indirectly, in the production of special nuclear material;section 2077(b)(2) of title 42

children.label: i
children.text: a sanction has been imposed under or or ;section 6301(a) of this titlesection 6303 of this titlesection 2799aa–1(b)(1) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: sales or leases have been denied under or transactions prohibited by reason of acts relating to proliferation of nuclear explosive devices as described in ;section 2753(f) of this titlesection 2780(d) of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: a sanction has not been imposed by reason of or the imposition of a sanction has been delayed under ; orsection 6301(c)(2) of this titlesection 2799aa–1(b)(4) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: or ,section 6301(f) of this titlesection 6303 of this title

children.label: II
children.text: , or paragraph (5) or (6)(B) of ,section 2375(d) of this titlesection 2799aa–1(b) of this title

children.label: III
children.text: with respect to the last sentence of , orsection 2780(g) of this titlesection 2780(d) of this title

children.label: IV
children.text: with respect to or , the last sentence of , or 2799aa–1(b)(1) of this title; andsection 2364 of this titlesection 2375 of this titlesection 2753(f) of this titlesection 2780(d) of this title2So in original. Probably should be preceded by “section”.2

children.label: C
children.text: the progress of those independent states of the former Soviet Union that are non-nuclear-weapon states and of the Baltic states towards achieving the objective of applying full scope safeguards to all their peaceful nuclear activities.

children.heading: Analysis of civil agreements for cooperation
children.label: b Analysis of civil agreements for cooperation
children.text: In the first report required by this section, the President shall analyze each civil agreement for cooperation negotiated pursuant to , and shall discuss the scope and adequacy of the requirements and obligations relating to safeguards and other controls therein.section 2153 of title 42
